mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, BRAND, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, FLOW_DIRECTION, FLOW_TYPE, EQUIP_IDS, EQUIP_NAMES, OUT_QUANTITY_SUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL WHERE WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_ID = #{outApplicationId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL ( ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, BRAND, APPLICATION_QUANTITY, FLOW_DIRECTION, FLOW_TYPE, EQUIP_IDS, EQUIP_NAMES, OUT_QUANTITY_SUM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{outApplicationId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flowType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outQuantitySum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL
WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_ID = #{outApplicationId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_NAME = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_MODEL = #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRAND = #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLICATION_QUANTITY = #{applicationQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FLOW_DIRECTION = #{flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FLOW_TYPE = #{flowType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_IDS = #{equipIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EQUIP_NAMES = #{equipNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OUT_QUANTITY_SUM = #{outQuantitySum,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(AD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY), 0) FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL AD INNER JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP A ON AD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_ID = A.ID WHERE AD.MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId} AND A.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND A.STATUS = '3' AND AD.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND A.DEL_FLAG = 0
AND A.ID != #{excludeOutApplicationId}
